name: Band Prone Leg Curl
shortDescription: A hamstring isolation exercise performed lying face down and flexing the knee using resistance from a band.
instructions: Lie face down, anchor a resistance band at your feet, and loop the other end around your ankle. Curl your heel toward your glutes, contracting your hamstring, then slowly lower back to start and repeat.
steps: Anchor the band securely at ground level.
Lie face down with legs extended.
Loop the band around your ankle.
Flex your knee, bringing your heel toward your glutes.
Slowly return to the start; repeat and switch legs if desired.
breathing: Exhale as you curl, inhale as you lower.
